mission.title: Weekly Helm & Image Version Drift Detection
mission.description: Recurring orbit mission that detects version drift across Helm releases and container images. Identifies outdated Helm charts, pinned-but-stale image tags, and inconsistent versions across namespaces to keep your cluster current.

steps.title: List all Helm releases and their chart versions
steps.description: Enumerate every Helm release in the cluster along with its chart version, app version, and status to establish a baseline.
commands: helm list -A -o json | jq -r '.[] | "\(.namespace)/\(.name) chart=\(.chart) appVersion=\(.app_version) status=\(.status)"'

steps.title: Detect Helm releases with pending or failed status
steps.description: Find releases that are not in a 'deployed' state, which may indicate failed upgrades or stuck rollbacks.
commands: helm list -A --failed -o json | jq -r '.[] | "FAILED: \(.namespace)/\(.name) chart=\(.chart) updated=\(.updated)"'

steps.title: Check for outdated container images
steps.description: List all unique container images in the cluster and flag any using mutable tags like 'latest' or missing a tag entirely.
commands: kubectl get pods -A -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{range .spec.containers[*]}{.image}{"\n"}{end}{end}' | sort -u | grep -E ':latest$|^[^:]+$' || echo 'No mutable-tag images found'

validation.command: kubectl get pods -A -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{range .spec.containers[*]}{.image}{"\n"}{end}{end}' | sort -u | grep -cE ':latest$|^[^:]+$' || echo 0

steps.title: Detect image version inconsistencies across namespaces
steps.description: Find cases where the same base image is running different versions in different namespaces, indicating drift.
commands: kubectl get pods -A -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.namespace} {range .spec.containers[*]}{.image}{"\n"}{end}{end}' | awk -F'[/: ]' '{base=$(NF-1); tag=$NF; key=base} {versions[key]=versions[key]" "$1"="tag} END {for(k in versions) print k": "versions[k]}' | sort

steps.title: Summarize Helm chart age
steps.description: Show how long ago each Helm release was last updated to identify releases that may need attention.
commands: helm list -A -o json | jq -r '.[] | "\(.namespace)/\(.name) updated=\(.updated)"' | sort -t= -k2

resolution.summary: Version drift check complete. All Helm releases and container images have been reviewed for staleness, mutable tags, and cross-namespace inconsistencies.
codeSnippets: kubectl get pods -A -o jsonpath='{..image}' | tr ' ' '\n' | sort -u

prerequisites.description: Requires kubectl and helm CLI with cluster access. jq is needed for JSON parsing.
